commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=554194f9b5f1c2e03fc0422c15f81bf642de7cf9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Claude-dialect JSONL parser fallback that forwards assistant records without a non-null message.stop_reason as accumulated streaming deltas, plus parser tests.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +166. Total +223 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is available for this PR's assistant-record premise. Source inspection shows current main would ignore assistant-only JSONL deltas if that stream shape exists, but maintainer live attempts on current main and the reported release saw pre-final deltas and requested raw failing stream-json.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor live proof and maintainer dependency-contract review before repair; automation cannot supply the reporter's Claude CLI stream or decide the permanent assistant-record semantics.

target.title: fix: relay Claude CLI assistant partial messages as streaming deltas
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
